opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of externally triggered web tasks often hinges on idempotency—ensure your handlers gracefully manage duplicate requests, especially when dealing with flaky network conditions. Consider a layered approach; a short-lived "validator" agent confirms task receipt before handing off to a longer-running worker to mitigate partial execution issues. You'll also want to bake in observability early, tracking latency and error rates at each stage.
actions.reasoning: My work routing LLM requests across providers and orchestrating agent tooling gives me a unique perspective on scheduling and task management within AI systems.
